title: Add Claude Code + Codex workflow guide and route top-level docs toward it
why_this_action: Primary Codeberg adoption is flat, while external lanes are either in active measurement windows, saturated, or auth-blocked.
Fresh shared findings say the repeated live pain is the Claude Code + Codex handoff gap and the current bottleneck is conversion from interest to free use.
A durable repo-native guide can capture high-intent evaluators now without waiting on external account access.

docs_change_brief.user_problem_addressed: Evaluators interested in Claude Code + Codex workflows need a clearer repo-native path from curiosity to a real first run.
docs_change_brief.target_audience: Developers and technical teams comparing manual multi-tool handoffs with a stronger workflow.
docs_change_brief.why_this_surface: The guide answers one concrete demand-capture question, while README and START_HERE are the shortest path to put that answer in front of high-intent repo visitors.
docs_change_brief.what_was_shortened_removed_merged: README quick links stayed at four by replacing the broader unattended-workflow link with the new Claude Code + Codex workflow guide instead of adding another top-level link.

docs_review_note.what_changed: Added a focused Claude Code + Codex workflow guide and routed README/START_HERE toward it for the handoff/review pain frame.
docs_review_note.why_it_belongs_here: This is the clearest high-intent question emerging from recent market and Reddit-adjacent findings, and it belongs one layer below README while still being promoted from the first-run path.
docs_review_note.what_was_pruned_shortened_merged: Kept README quick-link count flat by swapping in the new guide rather than expanding the top-level link set.
docs_review_note.why_top_level_is_better: The first-click path now better matches the current market pain without making README more branchy.

measurement_window.success_metric: This guide becomes part of the repo-first evaluation path and contributes to clearer qualified inspection or Codeberg star/watch/fork movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If Codeberg remains flat after the current external measurement windows close and this guide still has no visible reuse in distribution or conversion surfaces, replace it with a stronger proof asset instead of another light docs pass.
